title: thymus serpyllum proles ovatus
intro: Thymus serpyllum proles ovatus, also known as creeping thyme or wild thyme, is a perennial herb native to Europe and Mediterranean regions. This plant has been used for centuries in traditional medicine due to its antimicrobial and antifungal properties, which make it effective in treating respiratory issues such as coughs, colds, and bronchitis. The health benefits of Thymus serpyllum proles ovatus include its ability to reduce stress and anxiety, improve sleep quality, and boost the immune system. In herbal preparations, Thymus serpyllum proles ovatus is often used as a tea, tincture, or essential oil to promote relaxation and alleviate respiratory symptoms.
